name: vibe-keystone
description: Bootstrap a 626Labs-pattern AGENTS.md for any repository. The keystone is the load-bearing structural file — every agent decision in the repo rests on it. Inventories the repo, confirms scope, and produces an AGENTS.md adapted to the repo type (code platform / marketing site / long-form writing / mixed). Antigravity port of the Claude Code vibe-keystone plugin (which produced CLAUDE.md).
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version, kept for cross-port consistency and the opt-in capture log's plugin_version audit field. vibe-keystone has no skills and no session/friction loggers — the eponymous main command ported to the router workflow /vibe-keystone, and evolve-keystone to /vibe-keystone-evolve. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
